name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador v2: PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Guides LLMs through 10 stages — including ARCH (project scan), COMPLEXITY (Lite/Completo heuristic) and BRAINSTORM_GERAL (parallel domain orchestration with requirements-clarity, Codex and AGY as lenses) — producing per-update isolated artifacts under .pensador/<slug>/. All dialogue routes exclusively through AskUserQuestion.

plugins.name: cc-pensador
plugins.description: Pensador v2 skill + /pensador slash command. 10-stage PRD workflow: INIT (checkpoint v2 + feature isolation), PRD_BASE (Strict PRD Schema), ARCH (project scan via Read/Glob/Grep + architecture.md), EXPAND (candidate requirements), COMPLEXITY (Lite/Completo heuristic via detectComplexity), BRAINSTORM_GERAL (parallel domain orchestration: requirements-clarity + Codex if backend + AGY if frontend), CODEX (technical refinement), AGY (product gap analysis), FINAL (consolidation + artefacts under .pensador/<slug>/). All dialogue routes exclusively through AskUserQuestion.
